是很久以前活跃在海拉鲁的大盗的名字。
拉姆达是相当注重打扮啊……

据说他将用尽一生收集的<Color=red>服饰藏品<Color=white>
藏在了海拉鲁的某个地方。
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>我们觉得这个天地异变后

而拉姆達是位很注重時尚的人……

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>Tsk... <unk[5:0]>Whatever. No sense in trying to
hide it now.

<Color=red>Misko<Color=white>'s the name of an infamous bandit
who caused problems all over Hyrule back
in the day.
But Misko's legend expands beyond mere
banditry. You see, Misko is equally famous
for fashion.
The stories say that they spent a lifetime
<Color=red>collecting clothes<Color=white>—clothes that are now
hidden across Hyrule.
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>We suspect that Misko's wardrobe might
be in the caves that were exposed during
the Upheaval.
That's why we're here.


<unk[3:0:265]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]>And we got here first, <unk[5:0]>so if you're thinking
of swooping in and snatching those duds,
think again!

<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>そこで<Ruby={2:2}き>聞き<Ruby={2:4}みみ>耳<Ruby={2:2}た>立ててるお<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前も

<Ruby={2:2}み>見つからねぇぐらいなんだからさ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Hey, you eavesdropping over there! You
think you can find it? Then you'd better
think twice!
We're having trouble, and we're pros!

rows.CNzh:

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>If only one of us had a <Color=red>nose like a dog<Color=white>.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>就是啊，哥哥！<unk[5:0]>还不如给狗<Color=red>喂点吃的亲近一下<Color=white>，

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>對了，哥哥！<unk[5:0]>不如去<Color=red>餵食<Color=white>狗狗跟牠們<Color=red>親近<Color=white>一下，
讓牠們來幫忙尋找財寶吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>そうだ <Ruby={2:4}にい>兄さん！<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}いぬ>犬に<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}えさ>餌<Color=white>でもやって <Color=red>なつかせて<Color=white>
<Ruby={4:8}ざいほう>財宝を<Ruby={2:4}さが>探し<Ruby={2:2}あ>当ててもらおうよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>That's it, Dak! <unk[5:0]>Let's give a dog some <Color=red>food<Color=white>
or something to <Color=red>get it to like us<Color=white>,<Color=red> <Color=white>and then
it'll lead us to the treasure!
<unk[3:0:265]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>I was being sarcastic, Prissen!

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:9]>おい お<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前！
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:9]>Hey! Stop that!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>喂喂！<unk[5:0]>
你是从这里面找到的吗！？
放心不下跟过来一看，

<unk[3:0:263]>谁找到的归谁……<unk[5:0]>
我们不会跟你硬抢的。

<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>喂喂！<unk[5:0]>
你在這裡面找到財寶了喔！？

沒想到居然被你找到了……
<unk[3:0:263]>寶藏屬於發現它的人……<unk[5:0]>
我們不會硬是從你手上奪走的。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>おいおい！<unk[5:0]>
この<Ruby={2:4}なか>中から<Ruby={2:2}み>見つけたのかよ！？

まっさか<Ruby={2:2}み>見つけられちまうとはなぁ…
<unk[3:0:263]><Ruby={2:6}たから>宝は<Ruby={2:2}み>見つけた<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴の<Ruby={2:4}もの>物… <unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:4}むり>無理やり<Ruby={2:4}うば>奪おうなんてしないさ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>No way!<unk[5:0]> There are, like, a million chests in
here! How did you do that?!

OK, yeah. We tailed you, I admit, but we
never thought you'd actually find it!

<unk[3:0:263]>We've been hunting treasure long enough
to know the rules—finders keepers. <unk[5:0]>We're
not going to try to take it from you.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>すげーな… <unk[5:0]>いいなぁ… <unk[5:0]>
